allow: PowerShell($cmd = 'powershell -Command "& {$env:COLUMNS=[Math]::Max\(1,[Console]::WindowWidth-4\); $claudeDir=if \($env:CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR\) { $env:CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR } else { Join-Path $HOME ''.claude'' }; $p=\(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath \(Join-Path $claudeDir ''plugins\\cache''\) -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath \(Join-Path $_.FullName ''claude-hud''\) -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Where-Object { $_.Name -match ''^\\d+\(\\.\\d+\)+$'' } | Sort-Object { [version]$_.Name } -Descending | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName; & ''C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe'' \(Join-Path $p ''dist\\index.js''\)}"')

PowerShell(powershell -Command "& {$env:COLUMNS=[Math]::Max\(1,[Console]::WindowWidth-4\); $claudeDir=if \($env:CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR\) { $env:CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR } else { Join-Path $HOME '.claude' }; $p=\(Get-ChildItem \(Join-Path $claudeDir 'plugins\\cache\\claude-hud\\claude-hud'\) -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '^\\d+\(\\.\\d+\)+$' } | Sort-Object { [version]$_.Name } -Descending | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName; & 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe' \(Join-Path $p 'dist\\index.js'\)}" 2>&1)

PowerShell(powershell -Command "& {$env:COLUMNS=[Math]::Max\(1,[Console]::WindowWidth-4\); $claudeDir=if \($env:CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR\) { $env:CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR } else { Join-Path $HOME '.claude' }; $p=\(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath \(Join-Path $claudeDir 'plugins\\cache'\) -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath \(Join-Path $_.FullName 'claude-hud'\) -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '^\\d+\(\\.\\d+\)+$' } | Sort-Object { [version]$_.Name } -Descending | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName; Write-Host 'p=$p'; & 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe' \(Join-Path $p 'dist\\index.js'\)}" 2>&1)

Bash(cmd.exe /c 'powershell -Command "& {$env:COLUMNS=[Math]::Max\(1,[Console]::WindowWidth-4\); $claudeDir=if \($env:CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR\) { $env:CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR } else { Join-Path $HOME '\\''.claude'\\'' }; $p=\(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath \(Join-Path $claudeDir '\\''plugins\\cache'\\''\) -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath \(Join-Path $_.FullName '\\''claude-hud'\\''\) -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '\\''^\\d+\(\\.\\d+\)+$'\\'' } | Sort-Object { [version]$_.Name } -Descending | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName; & '\\''C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe'\\'' \(Join-Path $p '\\''dist\\index.js'\\''\)}"')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '& {try { $w=[Console]::WindowWidth } catch { $w=0 }; if \($w -le 0\) { $w = if \($env:COLUMNS -as [int]\) { [int]$env:COLUMNS } else { 120 } }; $env:COLUMNS=[Math]::Max\(1,$w-4\); $claudeDir=if \($env:CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR\) { $env:CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR } else { Join-Path $HOME '\\''.claude'\\'' }; $p=\(Get-ChildItem \(Join-Path $claudeDir '\\''plugins\\cache\\*\\claude-hud\\*'\\''\) -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '\\''^\\d+\(\\.\\d+\)+$'\\'' } | Sort-Object { [version]$_.Name } -Descending | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName; if \($p\) { & '\\''C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe'\\'' \(Join-Path $p '\\''dist\\index.js'\\''\) }}')
